evals.prompt: Review this login endpoint that stores passwords in plain text and uses string concatenation for SQL queries
assertions: identifies plain text password storage as critical vulnerability
recommends Argon2id or bcrypt for password hashing
identifies SQL injection vulnerability from string concatenation
recommends parameterized queries or prepared statements

evals.prompt: Build a threat model for a new file upload feature
assertions: uses STRIDE or similar systematic framework
identifies file type validation (magic bytes, not just extension)
addresses file size limits and DoS prevention
